landing.hero_subtitle: A secure, transparent, direct-to-bank land aggregation framework built on the Stellar network. No middlemen, no title fraud, absolute legal integrity.
landing.card_tokenized_desc: Every parcel is represented as a secure, legally-audited digital token. Prevent double-selling and title tampering.
landing.card_escrow_desc: Buyer funds are held in automated smart contracts and released only when land aggregation thresholds are successfully met.
landing.card_honesty_desc: Verifiers stake collateral and build reputation. Fraudulent attestations are slashed automatically via DAO consensus.
landing.direct_payout_bullet1: Direct bank payouts triggered instantly upon smart contract execution.
landing.direct_payout_bullet2: Safe, compliance-checked transfers removing administrative overhead.

wallet.bullet1: On-Chain Identity: Connect to verify your role (Farmer, Verifier, or Corporate).
wallet.bullet2: Secure Transactions: Authorize registrations, staking, and escrow releases securely.
wallet.install_freighter: Freighter is not installed. Click here to install.
wallet.network_warning: Warning: Connected to Mainnet. Please switch to Testnet.

payout.title: Institutional Land Registry Portal
payout.bullet1: Funds locked in Soroban escrow, guaranteed payout.
payout.bullet3: Automated dispute resolution via registry DAO.

verifier.warning: Warning: Stake is subject to slashing if fraudulent clearances are reported.
